commands.author: martingarramon
commands.command: p2 — taking the rebase. you're right, the gate should match the lifecycle-timestamp contract `session.ts:439` already uses. now loads the full session entry via `loadsessionstore` + `resolvesessionstoreentry` and threads `sessionstartedat` + `lastinteractionat` (alongside `updatedat`) into `evaluatesessionfreshness`, so the daily-reset and idle-reset paths converge with `initsessionstate`'s decision instead of diverging on `updatedat`-only (`bb55bf1b92`). two new regression tests: (a) `updatedat` recent + `sessionstartedat` past daily-reset boundary → history fetched; (b) `updatedat` recent + `lastinteractionat` past idle-reset boundary → history fetched. @greptile-apps p2 — duplicate import merged in the same commit.
commands.freeform_prompt: P2 — taking the rebase. You're right, the gate should match the lifecycle-timestamp contract `session.ts:439` already uses. Now loads the full session entry via `loadSessionStore` + `resolveSessionStoreEntry` and threads `sessionStartedAt` + `lastInteractionAt` (alongside `updatedAt`) into `evaluateSessionFreshness`, so the daily-reset and idle-reset paths converge with `initSessionState`'s decision instead of diverging on `updatedAt`-only (`bb55bf1b92`). Two new regression tests: (a) `updatedAt` recent + `sessionStartedAt` past daily-reset boundary → history fetched; (b) `updatedAt` recent + `lastInteractionAt` past idle-reset boundary → history fetched. @greptile-apps P2 — duplicate import merged in the same commit.

commands.author: martingarramon
commands.command: p2 — taking the rebase. the `!ctx.mediastaged` guard from current main was dropped when this branch went stale; restored it inside the new try/catch so synchronous prestaging still skips the second `stagesandboxmedia` pass, plus a focused regression on the prestaged-media path (`d290aec95f`). @greptile-apps p2 — noted but leaving as-is. the catch nullifies the cached promise on any throw inside `runbeforeagentreply` so we don't retain a half-failed module reference; narrowing to `err_module_not_found` is cleaner but a separate scope change.
commands.freeform_prompt: P2 — taking the rebase. The `!ctx.MediaStaged` guard from current main was dropped when this branch went stale; restored it inside the new try/catch so synchronous prestaging still skips the second `stageSandboxMedia` pass, plus a focused regression on the prestaged-media path (`d290aec95f`). @greptile-apps P2 — noted but leaving as-is. The catch nullifies the cached promise on any throw inside `runBeforeAgentReply` so we don't retain a half-failed module reference; narrowing to `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` is cleaner but a separate scope change.
